official_functions.role: Create the real initialized vehicle and passenger Entity fixture
Create the official passenger relationship and packet fixture
Write and dispatch the full Play clientbound framed packet

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol codec writes packet id 0x6b before the set_passengers body.
The fixture preserves vehicle entity id 3, passenger count 1, passenger entity id 4, and consumes the body.
This contract does not prove arbitrary passenger graphs, entity ids, world state, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this packet-support contract to infer arbitrary passenger relationship semantics.
